prompt: Compare departments across all evaluation dimensions

inputData.question: Compare departments across all evaluation dimensions

response.bodyRaw:
{"status":"success","steps":{"input":{"question":"Compare departments across all evaluation dimensions"},"sql":{"payload":{"question":"Compare departments across all evaluation dimensions"},"startedAt":1771855874877,"status":"success","output":{"reasoning":"The query compares all departments across multiple evaluation dimensions by aggregating course evaluation metrics. It joins departments through courses, course sections, enrollments, and course evaluations to calculate average ratings (overall, professor, content, difficulty), workload hours, and recommendation percentage for each department. Results are ordered alphabetically by department name for easy comparison.","sql":"SELECT 
  d.name AS department_name,
  d.code AS department_code,
  COUNT(DISTINCT e.id) AS total_enrollments,
  COUNT(DISTINCT ce.id) AS total_evaluations,
  ROUND(AVG(ce.overall_rating)::numeric, 2) AS avg_overall_rating,
  ROUND(AVG(ce.professor_rating)::numeric, 2) AS avg_professor_rating,
  ROUND(AVG(ce.content_rating)::numeric, 2) AS avg_content_rating,
  ROUND(AVG(ce.difficulty_rating)::numeric, 2) AS avg_difficulty_rating,
  ROUND(AVG(ce.workload_hours)::numeric, 2) AS avg_workload_hours,
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN ce.would_recommend THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT ce.id), 0), 2) AS recommend_percentage
FROM departments d
LEFT JOIN courses c ON d.id = c.department_id
LEFT JOIN course_sections cs ON c.id = cs.course_id
LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.id = e.course_section_id
LEFT JOIN course_evaluations ce ON e.id = ce.enrollment_id
GROUP BY d.id, d.name, d.code
ORDER BY d.name","assumptions":["Evaluation dimensions include: overall rating, professor rating, content rating, difficulty rating, workload hours, and recommendation percentage","All departments should be included even if they have no evaluations (using LEFT JOINs)","Recommendation percentage is calculated as the proportion of evaluations where would_recommend is true"]},"endedAt":1771855929684},"run-raw-sql":{"payload":{"sql":"SELECT 
  d.name AS department_name,
  d.code AS department_code,
  COUNT(DISTINCT e.id) AS total_enrollments,
  COUNT(DISTINCT ce.id) AS total_evaluations,
  ROUND(AVG(ce.overall_rating)::numeric, 2) AS avg_overall_rating,
  ROUND(AVG(ce.professor_rating)::numeric, 2) AS avg_professor_rating,
  ROUND(AVG(ce.content_rating)::numeric, 2) AS avg_content_rating,
  ROUND(AVG(ce.difficulty_rating)::numeric, 2) AS avg_difficulty_rating,
  ROUND(AVG(ce.workload_hours)::numeric, 2) AS avg_workload_hours,
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN ce.would_recommend THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT ce.id), 0), 2) AS recommend_percentage
FROM departments d
LEFT JOIN courses c ON d.id = c.department_id
LEFT JOIN course_sections cs ON c.id = cs.course_id
LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.id = e.course_section_id
LEFT JOIN course_evaluations ce ON e.id = ce.enrollment_id
GROUP BY d.id, d.name, d.code
ORDER BY d.name"},"startedAt":1771855929688,"status":"success","output":{"ok":true,"sql":"SELECT 
  d.name AS department_name,
  d.code AS department_code,
  COUNT(DISTINCT e.id) AS total_enrollments,
  COUNT(DISTINCT ce.id) AS total_evaluations,
  ROUND(AVG(ce.overall_rating)::numeric, 2) AS avg_overall_rating,
  ROUND(AVG(ce.professor_rating)::numeric, 2) AS avg_professor_rating,
  ROUND(AVG(ce.content_rating)::numeric, 2) AS avg_content_rating,
  ROUND(AVG(ce.difficulty_rating)::numeric, 2) AS avg_difficulty_rating,

  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN ce.would_recommend THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT ce.id), 0), 2) AS recommend_percentage
FROM departments d
LEFT JOIN courses c ON d.id = c.department_id
LEFT JOIN course_sections cs ON c.id = cs.course_id
LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.id = e.course_section_id
LEFT JOIN course_evaluations ce ON e.id = ce.enrollment_id
GROUP BY d.id, d.name, d.code
ORDER BY data.department_name: Wydział Informatyki i Nauki o Materiałach

visualization.title: Department Comparison Across All Evaluation Dimensions

axis.labelExpr: datum.label === 'avg_overall_rating' ? 'Overall Rating' : datum.label === 'avg_professor_rating' ? 'Professor Rating' : datum.label === 'avg_content_rating' ? 'Content Rating' : datum.label === 'avg_difficulty_rating' ? 'Difficulty Rating' : datum.label === 'avg_workload_hours' ? 'Avg Workload (hrs)' : 'Recommend %'

resultRaw.sql:
SELECT 
  d.name AS department_name,
  d.code AS department_code,
  COUNT(DISTINCT e.id) AS total_enrollments,
  COUNT(DISTINCT ce.id) AS total_evaluations,
  ROUND(AVG(ce.overall_rating)::numeric, 2) AS avg_overall_rating,
  ROUND(AVG(ce.professor_rating)::numeric, 2) AS avg_professor_rating,
  ROUND(AVG(ce.content_rating)::numeric, 2) AS avg_content_rating,
  ROUND(AVG(ce.difficulty_rating)::numeric, 2) AS avg_difficulty_rating,
  ROUND(AVG(ce.workload_hours)::numeric, 2) AS avg_workload_hours,
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN ce.would_recommend THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT ce.id), 0), 2) AS recommend_percentage
FROM departments d
LEFT JOIN courses c ON d.id = c.department_id
LEFT JOIN course_sections cs ON c.id = cs.course_id
LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.id = e.course_section_id
LEFT JOIN course_evaluations ce ON e.id = ce.enrollment_id
GROUP BY d.id, d.name, d.code
ORDER BY d.name

result.sql:
SELECT 
  d.name AS department_name,
  d.code AS department_code,
  COUNT(DISTINCT e.id) AS total_enrollments,
  COUNT(DISTINCT ce.id) AS total_evaluations,
  ROUND(AVG(ce.overall_rating)::numeric, 2) AS avg_overall_rating,
  ROUND(AVG(ce.professor_rating)::numeric, 2) AS avg_professor_rating,
  ROUND(AVG(ce.content_rating)::numeric, 2) AS avg_content_rating,
  ROUND(AVG(ce.difficulty_rating)::numeric, 2) AS avg_difficulty_rating,
  ROUND(AVG(ce.workload_hours)::numeric, 2) AS avg_workload_hours,
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN ce.would_recommend THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT ce.id), 0), 2) AS recommend_percentage
FROM departments d
LEFT JOIN courses c ON d.id = c.department_id
LEFT JOIN course_sections cs ON c.id = cs.course_id
LEFT JOIN enrollments e ON cs.id = e.course_section_id
LEFT JOIN course_evaluations ce ON e.id = ce.enrollment_id
GROUP BY d.id, d.name, d.code
ORDER BY d.name
